# Security floor: FastMCP 2.13.0.2 and Authlib 1.5.2 are flagged by the
# image vulnerability gate. Keep these overrides until mcp-agent-mail's
# transitive constraints move past the fixed versions.
fastmcp>=3.2.0
authlib>=1.6.9

# Security floor: CVE-2026-48526 (HIGH, auth bypass) in PyJWT < 2.13.0.
# CVEs in cryptography < 48.0.1. python-multipart and starlette lower-severity
# issues in the same Trivy scan. Remove once transitive deps carry fixed versions.
pyjwt>=2.13.0
cryptography>=48.0.1
python-multipart>=0.0.30
starlette>=1.1.0
